overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban district at dusk. The player character navigates past a large cylindrical holographic billboard, crosses busy streets lined with palm trees, and transitions from a neon-lit commercial area to an industrial sidewalk with security fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with holographic advertising tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a large cylindrical holographic billboard structure with neon advertisements

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with rotating holographic advertisements and neon lighting
tall palm trees lining the street
low-rise commercial structures with neon signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet city street at dusk, passing a prominent cylindrical holographic billboard on the left. Palm trees and commercial buildings with neon lights line the right side of the street while vehicles drive past on the road.

events.description: crossing the street at a busy intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the crossing

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large rocky mountain formation visible in the background against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the street away from the billboard, approaching a wide intersection. The camera crosses the street at 25 seconds, moving through moderate pedestrian traffic with mountains visible in the distant background under the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching holographic billboard from opposite direction

events.description: cylindrical holographic billboard re-enters view ahead as camera turns onto perpendicular street

agents.ego_description: walking toward the cylindrical billboard from the opposite direction, passing it on the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright red hair crossing the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: the same cylindrical advertising structure now viewed from the front with visible holographic displays

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the cylindrical billboard becomes visible again ahead as the camera turns onto a perpendicular street. The camera approaches and passes the structure, which moves from the left to the right side of the frame, while navigating through pedestrians including one with distinctive red hair.

events.description: transitioning from commercial district to industrial area with chain-link security fencing

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow sidewalk next to a tall security fence, following a pedestrian in a blue jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a blue hooded jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall chain-link security fence with barbed wire topping running alongside the sidewalk
large satellite dish visible on the horizon against the evening sky

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the commercial district into a more industrial area characterized by a tall chain-link fence with barbed wire on the left. The sidewalk is narrower and less crowded, with a large satellite dish visible in the distant background and palm trees continuing to line the right side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that gradually transitions into a stark industrial zone at dusk. It begins by walking along a wet city street, passing a prominent cylindrical holographic billboard on the left while neon-lit buildings and palm trees line the right. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up at a wide intersection where the viewer crosses through pedestrian traffic with distant mountains silhouetted against the twilight sky. The perspective then shifts onto a perpendicular street, circling back past the holographic structure and weaving through crowds, including a pedestrian with distinctive red hair. Finally, the environment transforms as the camera leaves the commercial hub, moving along a narrower sidewalk bordered by a tall chain-link fence with barbed wire and a distant satellite dish.
